metadata.description: Personal agent plugin marketplace with skills for conda packaging, data visualization, typesetting, writing, and more.

plugins.name: conda-packaging
plugins.description: Conda packaging operations with conda-forge and rattler-build. Fixes failing builds, creates new packages, migrates recipes, and builds conda packages.

plugins.name: data-visualization
plugins.description: Chart design and data storytelling with matplotlib, plus evaluation of non-deterministic functions with pydantic-evals.

plugins.name: typst
plugins.description: Modern markup-based typesetting system for scientific documents, presentations, and mathematical equations.

plugins.name: sqlalchemy
plugins.description: Python SQL toolkit and ORM. Engine management, declarative mapping, sessions, queries, relationships, and async support.

plugins.name: human-writing-en
plugins.description: English writing style that reads as human-authored, not AI-generated. Covers banned vocabulary, sentence patterns, tone, and formatting.

plugins.name: joss-review
plugins.description: Guide for reviewing Journal of Open Source Software (JOSS) submissions with complete review checklist and grading criteria.

plugins.name: presentation-design
plugins.description: Slide design and storytelling guidelines for all presentation tools. Covers outline-first workflow, minimal text, visual design, and pacing.

plugins.name: anthropic-skills
plugins.description: Document processing skills from Anthropic including PowerPoint, Word, Excel, and PDF capabilities.

plugins.name: scientific-skills
plugins.description: Scientific skills including literature review, peer review, and Polars DataFrame library.
